overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a Louisiana-style bayou swamp during an overcast rainy day. The character traverses muddy levees and wades through shallow swamp water surrounded by cypress trees and dense marsh vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated muddy levee between swamp pools

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a muddy path between stagnant swamp pools, moving away from wooden debris

entered.detail: broken wooden cart or barrel partially submerged in mud at path edge
tall cypress trees with Spanish moss lining the left side of the swamp
tall cypress trees with Spanish moss lining the right side of the swamp
stagnant greenish water reflecting the overcast sky
stagnant greenish water with algae patches
narrow elevated dirt path with tire tracks and puddles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow muddy levee path flanked by stagnant swamp pools on both sides. Tall cypress trees with Spanish moss line the distant edges of the wetlands, while a broken wooden cart sits partially submerged on the left near the starting point.

events.description: passing under the spreading branches of a large oak tree, creating temporary canopy cover

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while passing beneath a large spreading oak tree with gnarled branches

entered.detail: massive ancient oak with wide spreading branches and thick trunk

segments.scene_description: The path continues through denser tree cover as the character passes beneath a massive spreading oak tree that temporarily blocks the sky. The surrounding cypress trees feel closer, and the path ahead shows signs of flooding with visible water reflecting on the surface.

events.description: path becomes completely flooded, character enters waist-deep swamp water
character reaches the far bank and begins exiting the water back onto muddy ground

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep murky green swamp water with visible ripples and splashes

entered.detail: murky green swamp water reaching the character's waist with cloud reflections

segments.scene_description: The character wades through waist-deep murky green swamp water where the path has completely flooded. The water surface reflects the dark overcast sky and surrounding cypress trees as the character splashes forward before climbing back onto the muddy bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh trail with tall grasses

agents.ego_description: walking along a muddy trail through open marshland with tall grass on both sides

entered.detail: wider muddy trail through open grassland with less tree cover
tall green and yellow grasses lining the left side of the path
tall green and yellow grasses lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Having exited the water, the character continues along a muddy trail through more open marshland. The vegetation shifts to tall grasses on both sides of the path with scattered cypress trees in the distance, creating a more expansive view of the wetland landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a muddy levee that transitions from an open wetland into a dense, claustrophobic canopy. It begins with the character walking a narrow path flanked by stagnant swamp pools, passing a broken wooden cart partially submerged in the mire. As the journey continues, the distant line of Spanish moss-draped cypress trees draws closer, narrowing the field of view. The scene then shifts beneath the heavy branches of a massive spreading oak tree that temporarily obscures the overcast sky. Finally, the path ahead becomes increasingly flooded, with the surface of the mud giving way to reflective water as the character pushes deeper into the thicket.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a flooded swamp basin to an open, muddy marshland. It begins with the character wading through waist-deep, murky green water that reflects the dark overcast sky and towering cypress trees. As the character splashes forward, the camera tracks their movement until they climb back onto the muddy bank. The scene then expands into a more open landscape, shifting from the enclosed water to a muddy trail flanked by tall grasses. Finally, the view opens further across the wetlands, revealing scattered cypress trees in the distance under the gloomy sky.
